{{Quote|My name is Tyrral. I am the local trader for these parts. I sell goods to adventurers such as yourself.|Tyrral speaking to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:SG" />}}
'''Tyrral''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] fought between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. They worked on [[Station Gamma]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] inside of [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Ord Mantell Space]], after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], and their shop was known as [[Tyrral's Mercantile]].<ref name="SWG:SG" />

As Station Gamma had been overran by the [[Rak'qua]], a tribe of bellicose [[Nautolan/Legends|Nautolans]], the Chiss preferred to stay in the neutral area at the entrance of the station. There, they sold items such as [[Stimpack/Legends|stimpacks]] and [[Tatooine bug juice]] to [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] who came from the nearby [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]] and brave enough to explore the depths of Station Gamma. Tyrral frequently wore a [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Clothing/Legends|cloak]], a green-[[Gemstone/Legends|gemmed]] [[Necklace/Legends|necklace]], dark brown [[Glove/Legends|gloves]], and high-collared brown [[Robe/Legends|robes]] held fast by a large piece of metal around their abdomen. They had blue skin, red [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and brown-colored [[Hair/Legends|hair]].<ref name="SWG:SG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tyrral was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Star Wars video games|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:SG" /> prior to the game's closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Tyrral was added to the game in [[2005]] as a vendor on Station Gamma, one of the areas of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]],"<ref name="SWG:SG" /> introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref> Strangely, they were dressed with the outfit usually worn in the game by [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Imperial Inquisitors]].<ref name="SWG:II">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=other|Non-player character: "Imperial inquisitor"}}</ref>
